name: Berberine Improves Cognitive Deficiency and Muscular Dysfunction via Activation of the AMPK/SIRT1/PGC-1a Pathway in Skeletal Muscle from Naturally Aging Rats
summary: A naturally aging rat study testing whether berberine improves cognition, muscle function, insulin resistance, oxidative stress, and AMPK/SIRT1/PGC-1alpha pathway markers.
venue: The Journal of Nutrition, Health & Aging
